ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "shop_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shop where the order was placed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who placed the order */,
  "order_amount" REAL /* Total amount for the order */,
  "total_items" INTEGER /* Total number of items in the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the order was created */,
  "order_status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the current status of the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "order_note" TEXT /* Additional notes provided by the user */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual delivery date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_shop_id FOREIGN KEY ("shop_id") REFERENCES shops ("shop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_order_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_status_id") REFERENCES order_statuses ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the account was created */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shops" (
  "shop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shop */,
  "shop_name" TEXT /* Name of the shop */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the shop */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the shop */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the owner of the shop */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the shop */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the shop */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the shop is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shops_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES shop_owners ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order to which this item belongs */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being purchased */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product at the time of the order */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the item */,
  "tax" REAL /* Tax amount for the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "shop_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shop selling the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Available stock quantity of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment transaction */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order associated with this payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for this transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid in this transaction */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the payment was processed */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique transaction ID from the payment processor */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used for the payment */,
  "is_refunded" INTEGER /* Indicates if the payment has been refunded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order status record */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order being tracked */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., Created, Shipped, Delivered) */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the status was last updated */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the status */,
  "is_final" INTEGER /* Indicates if the status is the final status for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_statuses_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "carts" (
  "cart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shopping cart */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who owns the cart */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the cart was created */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the items in the cart */,
  "discount_applied" REAL /* Discount applied to the cart */,
  "tax_applied" REAL /* Tax amount applied to the cart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cart_items" (
  "cart_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cart item */,
  "cart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cart it belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product in the cart */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the cart */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the item in the cart */,
  "tax" REAL /* Tax amount for the item in the cart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cart_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cart_items_cart_id FOREIGN KEY ("cart_id") REFERENCES carts ("cart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cart_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who submitted the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating score given to the product */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the user in the review */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was created */,
  "is_verified_purchase" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review is from a verified purchase */,
  "is_helpful" INTEGER /* Number of times the review has been marked as helpful by other users */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the session */,
  "session_start" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "session_end" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user during the session */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shop_owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shop owner */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who is the owner */,
  "shop_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shop they own */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the shop owner is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)
